sql.if: AND ( UPPER(bc.bc_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(bc.bc_ir_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(bc.bc_broker_id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.broker_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(b.broker_office_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(bc.bc_order_nm) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(tcs.tcs_mbl_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(tcs.tcs_hbl_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(bi.bi_mbl_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(bi.bi_hbl_no) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM broker_charge bc LEFT JOIN broker b ON bc.bc_broker_id = b.broker_id LEFT JOIN com_code cc ON bc.bc_status_cd = cc.cc_cd LEFT JOIN tran_cost_stl tcs ON tcs.tcs_trc_no = bc.bc_ir_no OR tcs.tcs_trc_no = 'TRC-' || bc.bc_ir_no OR REPLACE(tcs.tcs_trc_no, 'TRC-', '') = bc.bc_ir_no LEFT JOIN tran_rcp tr ON tr.trc_no = tcs.tcs_trc_no LEFT JOIN bl_issu bi ON bi.bi_no = tr.trc_bi_no OR bi.bi_tre_id = tcs.tcs_trc_no WHERE bc.bc_owr_id = #{owrId}

SELECT bc_no , bc_ct_no , bc_ir_no , bc_owr_id , bc_broker_id , bc_bfp_no , bc_tax_amt , bc_broker_fee_amt , bc_fee_vat_amt , bc_total_amt , bc_status_cd , bc_status_nm , bc_order_nm , bc_payment_id , bc_charge_dt , bc_pay_cmpl_dt , bc_regist_dt , bc_updt_dt , bc_mbl_no , bc_hbl_no , broker_nm , broker_office_nm FROM ( SELECT list_query.bc_no , list_query.bc_ct_no , list_query.bc_ir_no , list_query.bc_owr_id , list_query.bc_broker_id , list_query.bc_bfp_no , list_query.bc_tax_amt , list_query.bc_broker_fee_amt , list_query.bc_fee_vat_amt , list_query.bc_total_amt , list_query.bc_status_cd , list_query.bc_status_nm , list_query.bc_order_nm , list_query.bc_payment_id , list_query.bc_charge_dt , list_query.bc_pay_cmpl_dt , list_query.bc_regist_dt , list_query.bc_updt_dt , list_query.bc_mbl_no , list_query.bc_hbl_no , list_query.broker_nm , list_query.broker_office_nm , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY CASE list_query.bc_status_cd WHEN 'BC_CHARGED' THEN 1 WHEN 'BC_PAID' THEN 2 WHEN 'BC_CANCEL' THEN 3 ELSE 9 END , NVL(list_query.bc_charge_dt, list_query.bc_regist_dt) DESC , list_query.bc_no DESC ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT bc.bc_no , bc.bc_ct_no , bc.bc_ir_no , bc.bc_owr_id , bc.bc_broker_id , bc.bc_bfp_no , bc.bc_tax_amt , bc.bc_broker_fee_amt , bc.bc_fee_vat_amt , bc.bc_total_amt , bc.bc_status_cd , cc.cc_nm AS bc_status_nm , bc.bc_order_nm , bc.bc_payment_id , bc.bc_charge_dt , bc.bc_pay_cmpl_dt , bc.bc_regist_dt , bc.bc_updt_dt , COALESCE(tcs.tcs_mbl_no, bi.bi_mbl_no, m.icm_mbl_no, ir.ir_bl_awb_no, TO_CHAR(tr.trc_bi_no)) AS bc_mbl_no , COALESCE(tcs.tcs_hbl_no, bi.bi_hbl_no, m.icm_hbl_no, tcs.tcs_mbl_no, bi.bi_mbl_no, m.icm_mbl_no, ir.ir_bl_awb_no, TO_CHAR(tr.trc_bi_no)) AS bc_hbl_no , b.broker_nm , b.broker_office_nm FROM broker_charge bc LEFT JOIN broker b ON bc.bc_broker_id = b.broker_id LEFT JOIN com_code cc ON bc.bc_status_cd = cc.cc_cd LEFT JOIN imp_rqst ir ON ir.ir_no = bc.bc_ir_no LEFT JOIN tran_cost_stl tcs ON tcs.tcs_trc_no = bc.bc_ir_no OR tcs.tcs_trc_no = 'TRC-' || bc.bc_ir_no OR REPLACE(tcs.tcs_trc_no, 'TRC-', '') = bc.bc_ir_no LEFT JOIN tran_rcp tr ON tr.trc_no = tcs.tcs_trc_no LEFT JOIN bl_issu bi ON bi.bi_no = tr.trc_bi_no OR bi.bi_tre_id = tcs.tcs_trc_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT icm_gg_no , icm_owr_id , icm_mbl_no , icm_hbl_no FROM ( SELECT m0.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m0.icm_gg_no, m0.icm_owr_id ORDER BY m0.icm_sbmsn_dt DESC NULLS LAST, m0.icm_no DESC ) AS rn FROM imp_cargo_manifest m0 ) WHERE rn = 1 ) m ON m.icm_gg_no = tcs.tcs_gg_no AND m.icm_owr_id = bc.bc_owr_id WHERE bc.bc_owr_id = #{owrId}
) list_query ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{startRow} AND #{endRow}

SELECT bc.bc_no , bc.bc_ct_no , bc.bc_ir_no , bc.bc_owr_id , bc.bc_broker_id , bc.bc_bfp_no , bc.bc_tax_amt , bc.bc_broker_fee_amt , bc.bc_fee_vat_amt , bc.bc_total_amt , bc.bc_status_cd , cc.cc_nm AS bc_status_nm , bc.bc_order_nm , bc.bc_payment_id , bc.bc_charge_dt , bc.bc_pay_cmpl_dt , bc.bc_regist_dt , bc.bc_updt_dt , COALESCE(tcs.tcs_mbl_no, bi.bi_mbl_no, m.icm_mbl_no, ir.ir_bl_awb_no, TO_CHAR(tr.trc_bi_no)) AS bc_mbl_no , COALESCE(tcs.tcs_hbl_no, bi.bi_hbl_no, m.icm_hbl_no, tcs.tcs_mbl_no, bi.bi_mbl_no, m.icm_mbl_no, ir.ir_bl_awb_no, TO_CHAR(tr.trc_bi_no)) AS bc_hbl_no , b.broker_nm , b.broker_office_nm FROM broker_charge bc LEFT JOIN broker b ON bc.bc_broker_id = b.broker_id LEFT JOIN com_code cc ON bc.bc_status_cd = cc.cc_cd LEFT JOIN imp_rqst ir ON ir.ir_no = bc.bc_ir_no LEFT JOIN tran_cost_stl tcs ON tcs.tcs_trc_no = bc.bc_ir_no OR tcs.tcs_trc_no = 'TRC-' || bc.bc_ir_no OR REPLACE(tcs.tcs_trc_no, 'TRC-', '') = bc.bc_ir_no LEFT JOIN tran_rcp tr ON tr.trc_no = tcs.tcs_trc_no LEFT JOIN bl_issu bi ON bi.bi_no = tr.trc_bi_no OR bi.bi_tre_id = tcs.tcs_trc_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT icm_gg_no , icm_owr_id , icm_mbl_no , icm_hbl_no FROM ( SELECT m0.* , ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY m0.icm_gg_no, m0.icm_owr_id ORDER BY m0.icm_sbmsn_dt DESC NULLS LAST, m0.icm_no DESC ) AS rn FROM imp_cargo_manifest m0 ) WHERE rn = 1 ) m ON m.icm_gg_no = tcs.tcs_gg_no AND m.icm_owr_id = bc.bc_owr_id WHERE bc.bc_no = #{bcNo} AND bc.bc_owr_id = #{owrId}
